query: CI headless run with prompts disabled: /nerdbot
expected_behavior: Agent recognizes the empty '/nerdbot' invocation and enters the Empty-Args handler
Agent surfaces the mode menu or a headless equivalent summary of the available create, ingest, enrich, audit, derive, improve, and migration routes
Agent detects that clarifying exchange is unavailable in headless execution
Agent downgrades to inventory-only planning with no destructive or mutating file changes
Agent does not guess a high-impact route such as migration or bulk repo repair without more input
